name: Rosebud Transportation LLC
recent_news: Minority-owned NEMT operator offering rides for medical appointments and errands; not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus / student-transport operator. Micro NEMT/senior-ride business with ~2 employees; no fit as a Summit tuck-in.

name: Limo One
districts_or_customers: Sun Prairie / Madison WI area private clients
recent_news: Founder Alfonso Greco passed away June 2017 after owning Limo One for ~22 years; current ownership/operating status unclear.
fit_notes: Limousine service, not a school-bus contractor; no SPED/yellow-bus operations. No fit as a Summit tuck-in.
